title: Moderation Update – 2026-04-29
body: Queue triaged (6 reports). Actions taken: BANNED spam_wave_42 (phishing links in multiple channels), BANNED toxic_runner (repeated harassment of newcomers), WARNED bot_like_user_77 (suspicious automated replies). Reports involving trusted_helper and core_maintainer were reviewed and closed as no-action (dispute/false positive from brigading). One low-severity formatting report closed without action. Community safety remains a priority — thank you for reporting.
